<!-- dignified-python-review -->

## ✅ Dignified Python Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 06:25:19 PT

All Python code changes follow dignified-python standards. No violations found.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL over EAFP - All conditional logic uses guard checks, no control-flow exceptions
✅ Exception handling - Proper error boundaries in CLI commands, correct use of SystemExit
✅ Path operations - No path operations in modified code
✅ Import organization - Module-level imports, no relative imports or re-exports
✅ Function parameters - 5+ parameter functions have `*` separator for keyword-only args
✅ Click patterns - Proper use of click.echo(), click.option(), and SystemExit
✅ Frozen dataclasses - No new dataclass modifications
✅ No re-exports - Empty `__init__.py` files added, no `__all__` modifications
✅ Performance - No property I/O or iteration in magic methods

### Files Reviewed
- `.claude/commands/erk/objective-plan.md`: Documentation (0 violations)
- `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md`: Documentation (0 violations)
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/dependency_graph.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/real.py`: 0 violations
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_objective_node.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_update_objective_node.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_plan_cmd.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/gateway/__init__.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/gateway/github/__init__.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/gateway/github/metadata/__init__.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/gateway/github/metadata/test_dependency_graph.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/gateways/github/metadata_blocks/test_state_sparkline.py`: 0 violations

### Code Quality Observations
- ✅ LBYL validation pattern in `update_objective_node()` (lines 228-238)
- ✅ Proper if/elif/else chain in `plan_data_provider/real.py` with guard checks
- ✅ Correct graph traversal with repeated guard checks in `dependency_graph.py`
- ✅ Well-structured test helpers with appropriate default parameters (test helper exemption)
- ✅ Click option parameters properly configured with keyword-only enforcement

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-25 06:25:19 PT**: Complete review - All 12 files compliant with dignified-python standards. Verified LBYL patterns, Click option handling, function signatures, test structure, and empty __init__.py files.
- **2026-02-25 06:18:54 PT**: No violations detected. PR 8161 complies with dignified-python standards.

</details>

comments.body:
<!-- dignified-code-simplifier-review -->

## ✅ Dignified Code Simplifier Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 06:25:02 PT

No violations detected. All code changes comply with dignified-python standards.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Patterns Checked
✅ LBYL pattern (no EAFP) - Consistently applied throughout
✅ Pathlib usage - All Path operations use pathlib.Path correctly
✅ Absolute imports only - No relative imports in new code
✅ O(1) properties - No I/O or iteration in properties/magic methods
✅ Max 4 indentation levels - Properly maintained throughout
✅ Keyword-only arguments - Proper use of `*,` separators where appropriate
✅ Type annotations - Modern syntax used correctly (str | None, dict[str, str], etc.)
✅ Frozen dataclasses - ObjectiveNode uses @dataclass(frozen=True)
✅ Variable scope - Variables declared close to use sites
✅ Sequential conditions - No nested if/else structures; uses LBYL pattern

### Files Reviewed
- `.claude/commands/erk/objective-plan.md`: Documentation updates (0 violations)
- `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md`: Reference doc updates (0 violations)
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/dependency_graph.py`: 0 violations - clean refactoring of find_graph_next_node with sequential checks
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/real.py`: 0 violations - previous nested structure now flattened to if/elif/else chain
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_objective_node.py`: 0 violations - proper LBYL validation pattern
- `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_update_objective_node.py`: 0 violations - well-written tests with clear docstrings
- `tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_plan_cmd.py`: 0 violations - documentation string improvement
- `tests/unit/gateway/github/metadata/test_dependency_graph.py`: 0 violations - comprehensive test coverage
- `tests/unit/gateways/github/metadata_blocks/test_state_sparkline.py`: 0 violations - tests properly updated for symbol change

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-25 06:25:02 PT**: Third review - No violations detected. Code follows all dignified-python standards correctly.
- **2026-02-25 06:19:06 PT**: Second review - No new violations detected. Previously flagged nested structure now resolved. All patterns compliant.
- **2026-02-25 05:39:26 PT**: First review - Found 1 nested if/else violation in real.py:704 - refactor opportunity to flatten structure

</details>

comments.body:
<!-- tripwires-review -->

## ✅ Tripwires Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 06:25:11 PT

Found 0 violations across 12 files. No issues detected.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Tripwires Triggered

The following category tripwires were checked based on file changes:

**Universal Tripwires** (from universal-tripwires.md):
- Gateway ABC implementation patterns
- Subprocess wrappers
- Discriminated union error handling
- Path.home() and time module usage patterns

**Architecture Tripwires** (from architecture/tripwires.md):
- Gateway implementation patterns
- Business logic in __init__ methods
- Time abstraction patterns

**CLI Tripwires** (from cli/tripwires.md):
- Exec script patterns
- RuntimeError usage
- Path.cwd()/Path.home() in exec scripts

**Testing Tripwires** (from testing/tripwires.md):
- Monkeypatch usage
- Test coverage for business logic changes
- Fake gateway patterns

**Commands Tripwires** (from commands/tripwires.md):
- Session ID substitution patterns
- Tool restriction patterns

### Tier 1 Pattern Matches (Mechanical)

✅ `subprocess\.run\(` - None found
✅ `\bimport time\b|time\.sleep\(|datetime\.now\(` - None found
✅ `Path\.home\(\)` - None found
✅ `os\.chdir\(` - None found
✅ `@patch|monkeypatch\.` - None found
✅ `\bgt\s+(sync|submit|restack|create|modify)` - None found
✅ `json\.dumps\(.*-F` - None found
✅ `gh\s+api\s+graphql` - None found

### Tier 2 Semantic Matches

✅ **Modifying business logic without adding tests** - All business logic changes have comprehensive test coverage:
  - `dependency_graph.py`: Sparkline symbol change (◐ for planning status) → tested in `test_dependency_graph.py` and `test_state_sparkline.py`
  - `dependency_graph.py`: find_graph_next_node fallback order (pending → planning → in_progress) → tested in `test_dependency_graph.py`
  - `update_objective_node.py`: Status-only updates without PR parameter → tested in `test_update_objective_node.py`
  - `real.py`: Planning status handling in objective_head_state → covered by integration tests

✅ **Adding a new method to Git/GitHub/Graphite ABC** - Not applicable (no ABC modifications)

✅ **Function signatures with 5+ parameters** - Not applicable (no functions with 5+ parameters added)

✅ **Using RuntimeError for expected CLI failures** - Not applicable (no RuntimeError usage)

✅ **Adding file I/O or subprocess calls to class __init__** - Not applicable (no __init__ modifications)

✅ **Using bare subprocess.run with check=True** - Not applicable (no subprocess calls)

### Files Reviewed

- `.claude/commands/erk/objective-plan.md`: 0 violations (documentation update)
- `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md`: 0 violations (documentation update)
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/dependency_graph.py`: 0 violations
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/plan_data_provider/real.py`: 0 violations
- `src/erk/cli/commands/exec/scripts/update_objective_node.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/cli/commands/exec/scripts/test_update_objective_node.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/cli/commands/objective/test_plan_cmd.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/gateway/__init__.py`: 0 violations (empty init file)
- `tests/unit/gateway/github/__init__.py`: 0 violations (empty init file)
- `tests/unit/gateway/github/metadata/__init__.py`: 0 violations (empty init file)
- `tests/unit/gateway/github/metadata/test_dependency_graph.py`: 0 violations
- `tests/unit/gateways/github/metadata_blocks/test_state_sparkline.py`: 0 violations

### Key Observations

1. **Excellent Test Coverage**: All business logic changes have corresponding unit tests:
   - Sparkline symbol change has dedicated tests verifying the new ◐ symbol for planning status
   - find_graph_next_node fallback logic has comprehensive tests covering all three fallback tiers
   - Status-only update functionality has tests for both success and error cases

2. **No Gateway ABC Changes**: No modifications to gateway ABCs, so no 5-place implementation required

3. **Proper Gateway Abstractions**: All code uses proper gateway abstractions (no direct subprocess calls, no Path.home() usage)

4. **Documentation Updates**: Both command and skill documentation properly updated to reflect the new behavior

5. **Consistent Patterns**: Changes follow erk coding standards (LBYL, frozen dataclasses, proper error handling)

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-25 06:25:11 PT**: No tripwire violations detected. All business logic changes have comprehensive test coverage. Proper gateway abstractions used throughout. New planning status properly tested.
- **2026-02-25 06:19:08 PT**: No tripwire violations detected. All business logic changes have comprehensive test coverage. Proper gateway abstractions used throughout. New planning status properly tested.
- **2026-02-25 05:40:20 PT**: No tripwire violations detected. All business logic changes have comprehensive test coverage. Proper gateway abstractions used throughout. New planning status properly tested.
- **2026-02-25 05:06:53 PT**: No tripwire violations detected. All business logic changes have corresponding tests. Proper gateway abstractions used throughout.

</details>
